pr-evidence/benchmark-plan-strict-v1-bun.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 approved the benchmark-plan strict V1 release-bundle flag with no blocking issues and spot-checked the CLI flag path.
verification: poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests
what_changed: Benchmark release-bundle plans now carry a require_complete_v1 flag.
The benchmark-plan CLI adds --release-bundle-require-complete-v1 and forwards --require-complete-v1 to the generated release bundle command.
Plan records now preserve whether strict V1 bundle generation was requested.
pr-evidence/benchmark-plan-strict-v1-bun.why: Release publishing workflows need a planned path to invoke the strict V1 bundle gate instead of only the lower-level release_bundle CLI supporting it.
